uses_mcp: grey area: Model indicated it doesn't have tools supporting MCP and asked for clarification, implying a lack of direct support but not a complete denial of any potential interaction.

capabilities.name: Text Generation
capabilities.description: Generates human-like text based on the input prompt.
capabilities.usage: Used for creative writing, content generation, and conversation simulation.
capabilities.constraints: May produce inaccurate or nonsensical information; cannot access real-time data.
capabilities.example-prompt-to-call: Generate a story about a dragon who loves art.

capabilities.name: Question Answering
capabilities.description: Provides answers to questions based on a vast amount of text data.
capabilities.usage: Used for educational purposes, FAQ responses, and general inquiries.
capabilities.constraints: Answers may not always be correct or up-to-date; relies on training data.
capabilities.example-prompt-to-call: What are the main causes of climate change?

capabilities.name: Summarization
capabilities.description: Condenses longer texts into shorter, coherent summaries.
capabilities.usage: Used in academic research, article summarization, and news briefings.
capabilities.constraints: Summaries may miss nuanced details; effectiveness can vary based on text complexity.
capabilities.example-prompt-to-call: Summarize the article on renewable energy.

capabilities.name: Language Translation
capabilities.description: Translates text from one language to another.
capabilities.usage: Used in communication, travel, and document translation.
capabilities.constraints: May not capture idiomatic expressions or cultural contexts accurately.
capabilities.example-prompt-to-call: Translate 'Hello, how are you?' to Spanish.

capabilities.name: Sentiment Analysis
capabilities.description: Analyzes text to determine the sentiment—positive, negative, or neutral.
capabilities.usage: Used in marketing, customer feedback analysis, and social media monitoring.
capabilities.constraints: Sentiment can be subjective; may misinterpret sarcasm or context.
capabilities.example-prompt-to-call: Analyze the sentiment of the review: 'The product is fantastic!'

tools.name: Text Generation
tools.description: Generates human-like text based on the provided prompt.
tools.usage: Used for creating articles, dialogues, or content completion.

required_parameters.prompt: The input text or question to generate a response.

optional_parameters.max_length: Limits the length of the generated text.
optional_parameters.temperature: Controls randomness in the response (0 to 1).

tools.constraints: Must adhere to ethical guidelines and avoid harmful content.
tools.provide-example-of-a-prompt-used-to-call: Generate a story about a space adventure.

tools.name: Image Recognition
tools.description: Analyzes and identifies objects or features in images.
tools.usage: Used for categorizing photos, facial recognition, or object detection.

required_parameters.image: The image file or URL to be analyzed.

optional_parameters.model_version: Specifies which version of the model to use.
optional_parameters.detection_threshold: Sets the minimum confidence for detections.

tools.constraints: Must ensure privacy and avoid misuse of personal data.
tools.provide-example-of-a-prompt-used-to-call: Identify objects in this photo of a park.

tools.name: Speech Recognition
tools.usage: Used for voice commands, transcription services, or voice search.

required_parameters.audio: The audio file or stream to be transcribed.

optional_parameters.language: Specifies the language of the audio.
optional_parameters.model: Identifies the type of speech recognition model to use.

tools.constraints: Must handle accents and dialect variations effectively.
tools.provide-example-of-a-prompt-used-to-call: Transcribe this audio recording of a meeting.

tools.name: Sentiment Analysis
tools.description: Analyzes text to determine the sentiment (positive, negative, neutral).
tools.usage: Used for social media monitoring, customer feedback analysis, or market research.

required_parameters.text: The input text to be analyzed.

optional_parameters.language: Specifies the language of the text.

tools.constraints: Must ensure context is taken into account for accurate analysis.
tools.provide-example-of-a-prompt-used-to-call: Analyze the sentiment of this customer review.

tools.name: Chatbot
tools.description: Interacts with users via conversational exchanges.
tools.usage: Used for customer service, assistance, or informational queries.

required_parameters.user_input: The message or question from the user.

optional_parameters.context: Previous conversation history to maintain context.
optional_parameters.personality: Defines the tone or style of the chatbot.

tools.execution_channel: Web Interface, Mobile App, or API
tools.constraints: Must engage users respectfully and avoid biased language.
tools.provide-example-of-a-prompt-used-to-call: User: How can I reset my password? Chatbot: Here’s how you can reset your password...
